name: avatar-picker
title: Avatar Picker
author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
description: Avatar picker with DiceBear generated avatars (8 styles), paginated grid, custom seed input, and drag-and-drop file upload. Self-contained — bundles its own DiceBear URL builder.
docs: Pass `currentSeed` (e.g. "pixel-art:my-seed") and wire up `onSelectGenerated`. Set `allowUpload` to false to hide the upload tab. Customize grid with `gridCount` and `columns`.
